<conditionalFormatting sqref="G167:H532 H165:H166 G162:G166 G2:H163"><cfRule type="expression" dxfId="60" priority="116" stopIfTrue="1"><formula>AND($B2="Yes",$G2<>"",$H2<>"",LOWER(TRIM($G2))<>LOWER(TRIM($H2)))</formula></cfRule></conditionalFormatting>

<conditionalFormatting sqref="S2:U101 S103:U532 S102 U102"><cfRule type="expression" dxfId="55" priority="41" stopIfTrue="1"><formula>AND(   $B2="Yes",   $U2<>"",   LOWER(TRIM($U2))<>"n/a",   COUNTIFS($U$2:$U$532,$U2,$B$2:$B$532,"Yes")>1 )</formula></cfRule></conditionalFormatting>

<conditionalFormatting sqref="R2:S49 R50:R149 R150:S531 B2:C532"><cfRule type="expression" dxfId="44" priority="159"><formula>AND($B2="Yes",$BO2<>"Yes")</formula></cfRule></conditionalFormatting>

<conditionalFormatting sqref="I2:I503"><cfRule type="expression" dxfId="7" priority="8" stopIfTrue="1"><formula>AND($I2<>"",OR($K2="Yes",$J2="PM Approved"))</formula></cfRule><cfRule type="expression" dxfId="6" priority="9" stopIfTrue="1"><formula>AND($I2<>"",NOT(OR($K2="Yes",$J2="PM Approved")))</formula></cfRule></conditionalFormatting>

<conditionalFormatting sqref="A2:R7 A8:B8 D8:R8 A9:R2002"><cfRule type="expression" dxfId="88" priority="3" stopIfTrue="1"><formula>AND(TRIM($A2)="",OR($B2<>"",$C2<>"",$D2<>"",$E2<>"",$I2<>"",$J2<>""))</formula></cfRule><cfRule type="expression" dxfId="87" priority="4"><formula>AND(TRIM($A2)<>"",NOT(AND(LEFT($A2,4)="PAL-",LEN($A2)=11,ISNUMBER(--MID($A2,5,7)))))</formula></cfRule><cfRule type="expression" dxfId="86" priority="5"><formula>AND(TRIM($A2)<>"",COUNTIF($A$2:$A$2002,$A2)>1)</formula></cfRule><cfRule type="expression" dxfId="85" priority="6"><formula>AND(TRIM($A2)<>"",$C2<>"",$D2<>"",$D2<>"0",$C2<>$D2)</formula></cfRule></conditionalFormatting>
